Prépare le logo en base64 ou public_path (pas asset())

notes: Without skill also achieves 100% on this eval. Minor differences: uses method chaining differently (sets options separately vs inline), passes variable as $pdfSettings instead of $settings. Missing isPhpEnabled=false (security gap). The with_skill version is slightly more complete with isPhpEnabled=false and better logo fallback chain.
